title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bajaj Allianz General Global Group - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bajaj Allianz General Global Group - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Bajaj Allianz General Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Nagpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bajaj Allianz General Global Group:
Bajaj Allianz General Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz General Global Group!
